top_findings.summary: The skill description implies requesting access to sensitive customer data sources such as support tickets, chat logs, sales calls, and user surveys for gathering questions. While these sources are related to the primary purpose of generating FAQs, the skill does not specify data minimization practices (e.g., anonymization, extraction of only question text) and may lead to unnecessary collection of personal or confidential information beyond what is required for creating help content.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description implies requesting access to sensitive customer data sources such as support tickets, chat logs, sales calls, and user surveys for gathering questions. While these sources are related to the primary purpose of generating FAQs, the skill does not specify data minimization practices (e.g., anonymization, extraction of only question text) and may lead to unnecessary collection of personal or confidential information beyond what is required for creating help content.
